name: English
notes: DeepCode UI localization pack. Translators can add messages/settings entries without changing frontend code.

messages.workbench.searchReserved: Search panel is reserved for the workspace search stage.
messages.git.stageHint: Git write operations are handled through Kernel permission tools.
messages.git.reservedTitle: Write operations are handled by Kernel permission tools
messages.explorer.title: Explorer
messages.explorer.confirm.deleteFolder: Delete folder "{name}" and all of its contents?
messages.explorer.emptyBody: Open a folder or workspace file to populate Explorer.
messages.explorer.error.renameSeparator: Rename only changes the current name; path separators are not supported.
messages.terminal.title: TERMINAL
messages.terminal.output.empty:
DeepCode terminal surface
Create or select a terminal session.
messages.workspaceDialog.title: Open Workspace
messages.workspaceDialog.addressPlaceholder: Enter or paste an absolute path, then press Enter
messages.workspaceDialog.systemFolderTitle: Open a folder with the system directory picker
messages.workspaceDialog.openFolderTitle: Open the selected folder, or the current directory when no folder is selected
messages.agent.attachmentDialog.title: Add file or folder
messages.browser.skeletonHint: No dev server, iframe, DOM capture, or Agent injection is started in this stage.
messages.browser.message.reserved: Browser preview skeleton is reserved for Stage 7.
messages.browser.message.statusUnavailable: Browser runtime status is not available.
messages.browser.message.openUnavailable: Open preview is not implemented yet.
messages.browser.message.reloadUnavailable: Reload preview is not implemented yet.
messages.browser.message.inspectUnavailable: Inspect mode is not implemented yet.
messages.browser.message.snapshotUnavailable: Panel snapshot is not available yet.
messages.browser.message.snapshotCaptureUnavailab: Panel snapshot capture is reserved but not implemented yet.
messages.browser.message.attachUnavailable: Attach snapshot is not implemented yet.
messages.settings.title: DeepCode Settings
messages.settings.search.label: Search
messages.settings.common.title: Common Settings
messages.settings.runtime.title: Runtime Information
messages.settings.token.title: Token Stats
messages.settings.token.scopeHint: Scope is the full current session flow, including user review and agent self-repair loops.
messages.settings.token.empty: No token usage or cache hit telemetry has been reported for this session yet.
messages.settings.noSearchMatch: No settings match the current search.
messages.settings.workbench.i18n.suffix: . Changing the display language is stored now; full UI reload/localization wiring lands in a later stage.
messages.settings.workspaceHint: Workspace-sourced values are controlled by the current workspace and must be changed in workspace settings.
messages.settings.llm.title: LLM Providers
messages.settings.llm.body: Configure the model used by Agent Runtime. API keys are stored in the local encrypted secret store; profiles only keep a secretRef.
messages.settings.llm.empty: No LLM profile is configured. Add a generic OpenAI-compatible profile or use one of the DeepSeek presets.
messages.settings.llm.thinkingHint: Thinking mode providers such as DeepSeek may ignore sampling parameters like temperature.
messages.settings.llm.saveKeyBeforeProbe: Save the new API key before probing
messages.settings.skill.title: Skill Runtime
messages.settings.skill.emptyMounts: Add a local folder that contains one or more DeepCode skills.
messages.settings.mcp.title: MCP Services
messages.settings.mcp.boundary: MCP services currently store configuration and risk acknowledgment only; real connection, tool projection, and permission decisions remain Kernel/MCP follow-up work.
messages.settings.mcp.emptyServers: Add a stdio or HTTP MCP service configuration.
messages.settings.sessionBoundary.title: Session Boundary
messages.settings.sessionBoundary.body: Conversation assembly is owned by userspace SessionDriverLoop. Kernel and Daemon expose state contracts, facts, and transport only.
messages.settings.sessionBoundary.readonly: This panel is read-only; maintain user-editable constraints in Ruler and keep permissions in Kernel policy.
messages.settings.ruler.title: Ruler Rules
messages.settings.ruler.body: Ruler is the user-maintained LLM behavior and coding preference contract. It may override built-in style defaults, but it cannot grant permissions, override Protocol Contract, or bypass Kernel.
messages.settings.ruler.empty: Add a rule to define workflow, style, safety, or project-specific guidance for Agent runs.
messages.settings.ruler.priorityTitle: Higher priority rules are injected first.
messages.settings.doctor.title: Runtime Doctor
messages.settings.doctor.body: Checks the active runtime, workspace, settings, Agent profiles, skills, rules, and minimum tool bridge.
messages.settings.doctor.noWorkspace: No active workspace folder is available.
messages.settings.doctor.settingsNotLoaded: Settings store path is not loaded yet.
messages.settings.doctor.noSkills: No external skill mount is configured, auto-load {autoLoad}.
messages.settings.doctor.noMcp: No MCP service is configured, auto-enable {autoLoad}.
messages.settings.doctor.detail.tools: {count} tool(s) registered; writes are gated by Act mode approval.
messages.settings.doctor.toolsNotReachable: Agent tool interface is not reachable.
messages.workspace.title: Workspace
messages.workspace.noneBody: DeepCode will stay empty until you open a folder or a .code-workspace file.
messages.workspace.name: Name
messages.workspace.deepcodeSettingsBody: These settings live in the current workspace context. After saving as .code-workspace, they are written into the workspace file settings field.
messages.workspace.unsupportedBody: DeepCode does not parse VSCode-specific fields such as extensions, tasks, launch, or remoteAuthority.
messages.workspace.archiveBody: Archive files are generated by the current Agent session. This action copies the local path only; it does not invoke a system folder opener.
messages.workspace.memoryBody: Workspace memory is a read-only projection derived from Agent session events in the current workspace. It does not create facts or grant permissions.
messages.memory.projectSubtitle: Read-only project memory aggregated from grouped sessions.
messages.memory.workspaceSubtitle: Read-only workspace memory aggregated from workspace sessions.
messages.memory.sessionSubtitle: Read-only session memory from one conversation.
messages.deepcodeGui.agent.subtitle: DeepCode Agent
messages.deepcodeGui.session.deleteUnavailable: Conversation delete API is not available yet. Archive it first.
messages.deepcodeGui.home.prompt: What should we do in DeepCode?
messages.deepcodeGui.tasks.title: Task list
messages.deepcodeGui.subagents.title: Sub-agents
messages.deepcodeGui.progress.title: Progress
messages.deepcodeGui.context.title: Context
messages.deepcodeGui.plan.useComposer: Use the composer below to accept the plan, or type requested changes before submitting.
messages.agent.action.invalidBlock: Agent returned an invalid deepcode-action block.
messages.agent.composer.placeholder.running: Add guidance while Agent is running...
messages.agent.workflow.title: Workflow Models
messages.agent.workflow.noProfile: Configure and save a valid LLM profile first.
messages.agent.message.readyBody: Add files with @ or Explorer right click, then ask for a focused edit.
messages.agent.requirement.title: Requirement Confirmation
messages.agent.requirement.useComposer: Use the composer below to confirm the requirement understanding, or type requested changes before submitting.
messages.agent.guidance.title: User guidance
messages.agent.guidance.summary: User guidance recorded; it will apply at the next provider call.
messages.agent.plan.reviewPlaceholder: Enter plan review feedback or requested changes...
messages.agent.plan.useComposer: Use the composer below to accept the plan, or type requested changes before submitting.
messages.agent.review.title: Review
messages.agent.review.continuationCount: {count} continuation intent(s) recorded; accepting review will not continue automatically.
messages.agent.review.placeholder: Enter review feedback or requested changes...
messages.agent.review.useComposer: Use the composer below to accept review, or type feedback before submitting.
messages.review.summary: Review summary: {changedFiles} file-level change(s), {auditRefs} audit ref(s).
messages.review.summary.waitingUserReview: The current batch has executed. Review the tool facts and validation results.
messages.review.summary.needsAttention: The current batch has failed or blocked items. Review the facts before deciding whether to revise.
messages.agent.composer.decision.planPlaceholder: Tell DeepCode how to adjust if needed...
messages.agent.composer.decision.requirementPlace: Tell DeepCode how to adjust if needed...
messages.agent.composer.decision.choicePlaceholde: Tell DeepCode how to adjust if needed...
messages.agent.composer.decision.reviewPlaceholde: Tell DeepCode how to adjust if needed...
messages.agent.composer.decision.permissionPlaceh: Send empty to accept the permission request; use the adjacent button to reject...
messages.agent.composer.decision.optionConfirmHin: Confirm the current plan or review point and continue.
messages.agent.composer.decision.optionReviewHint: Type requested changes in the input box and submit to revise.
messages.agent.composer.decision.optionEndHint: End this confirmation point and do not continue the plan.
messages.agent.composer.decision.submitChoiceTitl: Submit the selected option and supplemental guidance
messages.agent.composer.decision.resolvingDetail: Confirmation submitted. Waiting for the shared Session Runtime to stream progress.
messages.agent.composer.decision.submitGuidanceTi: Submit requested changes or review feedback
messages.agent.trace.title: Thought trace
messages.agent.error.title: Error
messages.app.closeConfirm.title: Save Changes
messages.app.closeConfirm.message: There are unsaved files. Save these changes before exiting?
messages.app.closeConfirm.detail: Choosing “Don't Save” discards unsaved editor contents; choosing “Cancel” returns to DeepCode.
messages.runtime.workspacePickerUnsupported: The unified GUI Host accesses workspaces through the Rust Kernel Web Host. Use the browse dialog to choose a path.
messages.codeWorkspaceChoice.title: Open .code-workspace File
messages.codeWorkspaceChoice.hint: This file is a VS Code-style workspace descriptor. How should DeepCode handle it?
messages.codeWorkspaceChoice.openAsJsonTitle: Edit as a JSON file in the editor
messages.codeWorkspaceChoice.openAsWorkspaceTitle: Open this file as the workspace and replace the current workspace
messages.editor.empty.title: Open a file to start editing
messages.editor.empty.hint: Select a file from the file tree on the left
messages.editor.notice.binaryBody: {filePath} is a binary file and is not shown in the editor at this stage.
messages.editor.notice.largeBody: {filePath} is {size} bytes, which exceeds the {threshold} MiB limit. It is shown as a read-only notice and is not opened in the editor.
messages.editor.notice.largeHint: Tip: opening large files in Monaco can cause performance issues
messages.editor.notice.largeWarning: File exceeds {threshold} MiB; editing and saving may be delayed.
messages.editor.save.blocked: Save failed: file changes must be confirmed through an Agent plan and executed by Kernel
messages.explorer.error.hostMutationDisabled: File changes must be confirmed through an Agent plan and executed by Kernel.
messages.workspace.error.defaultOpen: Failed to open the default workspace
messages.workspace.error.noSavableFolder: There is no workspace folder to save
messages.deepcodeGui.bootstrap.startFailedBody: The frontend workbench did not finish rendering. The startup error is shown below to help diagnose packaging blank screens.
messages.deepcodeGui.bootstrap.renderFailedBody: The React workbench encountered an error after startup.
messages.deepcodeGui.kernelStart.waitingHealth: Kernel start was requested; waiting for API health.
messages.deepcodeGui.cache.label: Cache {percent}
messages.deepcodeGui.cache.noTelemetryTitle: No cache hit telemetry has been reported for this conversation flow yet
messages.deepcodeGui.cache.telemetryTitle: Current conversation flow cache hits {hitTokens} tokens, misses {missTokens} tokens
messages.agent.run.cancelled: The current Agent request has been asked to stop.
messages.diagnostic.decisionResolverMissing: Decision kind "{kind}" is not yet connected to Session DecisionResolver.
messages.diagnostic.protocolRepairFailed:
{message}

The model output could not form a valid structured proposal (protocol format issue); automatic repair was attempted but unsuccessful. Previously completed steps are not affected. You may retry this turn or rephrase your request.
messages.diagnostic.providerCallFailed:
Model call failed: {raw}

The connection to the model was interrupted (possibly due to network fluctuation, provider timeout, or response stream closure). Previously completed steps are not affected; please retry this turn.
messages.diagnostic.resourceResolveRepairFailed: The requested resources could not be located in attachments or project directory, and repair failed: {message}
messages.diagnostic.acceptedPlanScopeRecoveryFail: Accepted-plan scope decision could not recover the original implementationPlan; Session will not start a detached requirement flow.
messages.diagnostic.acceptedPlanInteractionRecove: Accepted-plan interaction decision could not recover the parent implementationPlan; Session will not start a detached requirement flow.
messages.diagnostic.planProposalReviewedMissing: Kernel did not return a proposal.reviewed event for the actionBundle; Session will not display a confirmable plan.
messages.diagnostic.planRevisionRepairFailed: The plan needs revision, but model repair failed: {message}
messages.diagnostic.autoBatchResourceResolveFaile: Automatic execution batch requires additional resource evidence, but the repaired resourceRequest could not be located: {detail}
messages.diagnostic.autoBatchScopeRepairFailed: Automatic execution batch went out of scope and model repair failed: {message}
messages.diagnostic.autoPlanProposalReviewedMissi: Kernel did not return a proposal.reviewed event for the accepted-plan actionBundle; Session will not auto-execute this batch.
messages.diagnostic.autoBatchRevisionRepairFailed: The automatic execution batch needs revision, but model repair failed: {message}
messages.diagnostic.autoBatchRejected: Kernel rejected the automatic execution batch: {reasons}
messages.diagnostic.subAgentModeViolation: Sub-agent mode is off, but Session attempted to emit a sub-agent branch/merge delta. Automatic execution has been stopped as a Session orchestration violation.
messages.requirement.optionEffect.continueWithAct: Generate the next batch of execution actions
messages.requirement.optionEffect.skipCurrentTask: Mark the current task as completed and advance the cursor
messages.requirement.optionEffect.replan: Return to plan stage and re-plan

workbench.language.label: Display Language
workbench.language.description: Choose the UI language. Language packs are loaded from local i18n files; reload the workbench after changing this value.

workbench.styleTokenOverrides.label: Style Token Overrides
workbench.styleTokenOverrides.description: Reserved JSON style-token override map for future custom themes.

workbench.previewEditor.label: Preview Editor
workbench.previewEditor.description: External editor used when opening changed files from Agent UI.

files.hotExit.label: Hot Exit
files.hotExit.description: Keep unsaved editor state across reload or restart.

keyboard.enableBasicShortcuts.label: Basic Shortcuts
keyboard.enableBasicShortcuts.description: Enable basic shortcuts such as Ctrl+S, Ctrl+Shift+S, Ctrl+A and Ctrl+,.

explorer.confirmDelete.label: Confirm Delete
explorer.confirmDelete.description: Ask for confirmation before deleting resources.

terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.windo.label: Windows Terminal Profile
terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.windo.description: Default packaged Windows shell. WSL keeps Agent commands Unix-compatible.

terminal.integrated.prewarm.label: Terminal Prewarm
terminal.integrated.prewarm.description: Warm terminal runtime after startup to reduce first terminal latency.

terminal.integrated.spawnTimeoutMs.label: Terminal Spawn Timeout
terminal.integrated.spawnTimeoutMs.description: Terminal background spawn timeout in milliseconds.

agent.defaultMode.label: Default Permission Mode
agent.defaultMode.description: Default permission mode for new Agent sessions.

agent.defaultWorkflow.label: Default Workflow
agent.defaultWorkflow.description: Default Agent behavior when a user sends a task.

agent.requirementConfirmationMode.label: Requirement Confirmation
agent.requirementConfirmationMode.description: Controls whether Session asks the user to confirm requirement understanding before side-effect planning.

agent.reviewContinuationMode.label: Review Continuation
agent.reviewContinuationMode.description: Controls whether accepted Review batches automatically generate the next Plan. Auto mode generates a Plan only and still waits for Plan confirmation.

agent.interventionLevel.label: User Intervention Level
agent.interventionLevel.description: Controls how often Agent asks the user to choose between engineering details before planning.

agent.memory.projectMode.label: Project Memory Mode
agent.memory.projectMode.description: Controls whether project memory candidates require user confirmation before promotion.

agent.subagents.mode.label: Sub-agents
agent.subagents.mode.description: Conservative parallel draft generation for independent accepted-plan tasks. Parent Session still validates and submits all work.

agent.subagents.maxParallel.label: Sub-agent Max Parallel
agent.subagents.maxParallel.description: Maximum parallel sub-agent draft branches. Version 1 clamps this value to 2.

agent.permissions.allowFileRead.label: Allow File Read
agent.permissions.allowFileRead.description: Allow Agent tools to read workspace files.

agent.permissions.allowFileWrite.label: Allow File Write
agent.permissions.allowFileWrite.description: Allow Agent tools to request file writes. Writes still require approval.

agent.permissions.allowCodeSearch.label: Allow Code Search
agent.permissions.allowCodeSearch.description: Allow Agent tools to search code in the workspace.

agent.permissions.allowShellPropose.label: Allow Shell Proposals
agent.permissions.allowShellPropose.description: Allow Agent to propose shell commands without executing them.

agent.permissions.allowShellExec.label: Allow Shell Execution Requests
agent.permissions.allowShellExec.description: Allow Agent to request or execute shell commands through the Agent permission policy.

agent.permissions.processExec.label: Process Execution
agent.permissions.processExec.description: Permission policy for process.exec work units.

agent.permissions.networkEgress.label: Network Egress
agent.permissions.networkEgress.description: Permission policy for outbound network or web evidence requests.

agent.permissions.gitWrite.label: Git Write
agent.permissions.gitWrite.description: Permission policy for Git stage, unstage, and commit work units.

agent.permissions.gitPush.label: Git Push
agent.permissions.gitPush.description: Permission policy for Git push. Push is not automatic by default.

agent.git.commitMessageMode.label: Commit Message Mode
agent.git.commitMessageMode.description: Allow the Agent to ask the model for commit message suggestions from review diff facts.

agent.integrations.github.enabled.label: GitHub Integration
agent.integrations.github.enabled.description: Enable GitHub metadata access through configured repository and secret references.

agent.integrations.github.repoUrl.label: GitHub Repository URL
agent.integrations.github.repoUrl.description: Optional GitHub repository URL. Workspace git remote is used when this is empty.

agent.integrations.github.authSecretRef.label: GitHub Auth Secret Ref
agent.integrations.github.authSecretRef.description: Secret reference for GitHub authentication. Do not store plaintext tokens here.

agent.integrations.github.defaultRemote.label: GitHub Default Remote
agent.integrations.github.defaultRemote.description: Git remote name used when deriving repository information.

agent.integrations.github.pushPolicy.label: GitHub Push Policy
agent.integrations.github.pushPolicy.description: Controls whether push requires manual confirmation, asks through permission policy, or follows explicit allow settings.

agent.permissions.browserControl.label: Browser Control
agent.permissions.browserControl.description: Permission policy for browser.control work units.

agent.permissions.providerEgress.label: Provider Egress
agent.permissions.providerEgress.description: Permission policy for provider egress audit and external model calls.

agent.shell.autoExecuteCommands.label: Auto Execute Commands
agent.shell.autoExecuteCommands.description: Allow approved process.exec requests to run automatically when process execution is enabled.

agent.shell.commandBlacklist.label: Command Blacklist
agent.shell.commandBlacklist.description: Comma-separated command fragments that always require manual approval before shell execution.
